attributes.action: Oppose and Stop UK Support for Military Action and War Against Iran
attributes.additional_details: We call on the UK Government to oppose military action against Iran and refuse any involvement or support. This includes denying the use of UK bases, airspace, intelligence sharing, or logistical assistance. The Government must suspend arms sales to states engaged in the conflict and actively press for an immediate ceasefire and a diplomatic resolution to prevent further escalation and loss of life.
attributes.background: We condemn the unprovoked military attack on Iran by the United States and Israel. This action risks devastating consequences for the region and global peace. Carried out without clear legal justification,the use of force undermines international law and makes a peaceful solution ever more distant.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Withdraw involvement in war on Iran and seek diplomatic resolution" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/761718
